silentDriftRegression.interpretation: Tree-sitter (production svc-ingestion via packages/utils/java-parsing) ground truth = 0 silent drifts on these samples. The 17 count measures regex-CLI (legacy scripts/java-ast/runner.ts) failures relative to Tree-sitter. Tree-sitter integration produces 0 drift; legacy CLI remains as historical reference.

base_path_missing.rootCause: regex CLI does not extract class-level @RequestMapping value into endpoint base path. Tree-sitter AST captures it correctly via parseAnnotation().

path_incomplete.rootCause: regex CLI emits methodPath only (e.g. '/charge'). Tree-sitter emits fullPath (basePath + methodPath = '/api/v1/lpon/payment/charge').

return_type_generic_loss.rootCause: regex CLI returnType pattern matches '\S+' which strips generics. Tree-sitter AST extracts via getReturnType() preserving 'ResponseEntity<List<PaymentHistory>>' etc.

mapper_skipped.rootCause: regex CLI skips @Mapper interfaces (not @Service/@Controller/@Entity). Tree-sitter AST detects @Mapper annotation and classifies kind='mapper'.

silentDriftRegression.verdict: Tree-sitter parser fully resolves all 4 silent drift categories (17 → 0). Production svc-ingestion since Sprint 257 PR #52 produces zero-drift output.

reconcileSanity.notes: DIVERGENCE=0 occurred because mock paramCount happened to match between charge (source=1, doc=1) and withdrawal/initiate (source=2, doc=2). Future sanity script can force paramCount mismatch for completeness.

uploadAuthCheck.interpretation: Cold-start successful + INTERNAL_API_SECRET middleware正常 active. 실 ingest E2E는 secret 보유 환경에서만 가능 (Master inline에서 downgrade).

productionSmoke.verdict: PASS — Tree-sitter production deploy alive after Sprint 257 MERGE.

markers.astPattern: AST literal `0` 직접 할당 + assignment target 매칭 + spec 공식 명시. 정확 패턴 매칭 가능.

markers.astPattern: spec.rules ALT 명시 vs source 분기 함수 부재 매핑. BL-026과 유사 패턴.
